free_text: Dynamical deformation of nuclei in deep-inelastic
collisions: A gamma coincidence study of 130Te + 275
MeV 64Ni and 208Pb + 345 MeV 58Ni heavy ion  reactions
Isotopic yields given
Elemental and mass yields given
The GASP multi-detector Germanium array was
the principal device for  gamma coincidence
measurements. The 40 Germanium detectors of the GASP
array  provided the total photo-peak gamma detection
efficiency of about 3% for  1332 keV gammas.
Thick target were used. Incident energy was 13%(12%)
above the  Coulomb barrier for 275 MeV 64Ni beam (345
MeV 58Ni) beam.
Approved by W.Krolas, 11 January 2011
V.S.
The XTU Tandem accelerator
A 64Ni pulsed beam with a 200 ns repetition
rate. The beam energy at the surface of the
target corresponded to a collision at 13% above
the Coulomb barrier.
A 1.2 mg/cm**2 thick 99% enriched 130Te target
evaporated on a 14 mg/cm**2 208Pb backing.
Off- and in-beam gamma-gamma coincidence analysis
combined with measurements of radioactive decay of
isotopes produced and stopped in the target.
yield determined from radioactivity measurements
yield established from radioactivity measurements
and confirmed by the off-beam gamma
yield determined from off-beam gamma
coincidence data
yield determined from in-beam coincidence data
yield determined from both off- and in-beam
coincidences
Relative production yields have been
established with 10 to 40% accuracy taking into
account all possible sources of errors.
Uncertainty due to absolute cross-section normalization
is not included.
Systematic error of 50% due to the and to
the spread in the experimental collision energy
caused by slowing down of the projectile within the
1.2 mg/cm**2 thick 130Te target was assumed.

Production yield is obtained from
interpolation of the results obtained for the
neighbouring nuclei.

The XTU Tandem accelerator.
The 58Ni beam from the Tandem was post-accelerated by
the ALPI superconductive accelerator.
The collision energy of the 58Ni beam was
about 12% above the Coulomb barrier. The beam was
pulsed with a 200 ns pulse repetition rate.
Very thick 200 mg/cm2 99% enriched 208Pb target
